title: polypodium cincinalis
intro: Polypodium cincinalis, also known as Polypodium leucotomos or Polypodium leucotomos var. cincinalis, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is commonly found in Central and South America, and its medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries to treat various health conditions. The plant has anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for skin conditions, such as sun damage, and for protecting against cancer and other diseases. Polypodium cincinalis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or topical cream, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like eczema and acne.
